programme.title: TFI Friday Unplugged
programme.desc: Chris Evans brings his entertainment show back to Channel 4 in a more intimate format, featuring interviews with the biggest stars and music by the latest bands from the presenters studio at Virgin Radio UK

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Self-professed crazy camel lady 70-year-old Sandra from Cornwall is looking for a mature man to ride off into the sunset with and 25-year-old freelance creative Toni-Ann from London dreams of being the heroine of her own erotic novel

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Nicolle and Ben arrive at the retreat keen to spice up their seven-year relationship by having sex with other people. However, when Nicolle reveals that shes a people pleaser who finds it hard to say no, Dr Lori warns the couple that Nicolle needs to vocalise her feelings. The pair invite resident couple Kiki and Sophia to spend some intimate time with them in the hot tub, and the fun continues in the bedroom. But is Nicolle as happy with the nights sexual climax as she seems? Meanwhile, thrill-seekers Katey and Dan pursue a live sex show experience

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cooks work is being undone by the managers marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George travels to Margate, where Joanna and Simon have bought themselves a large Victorian semi-detached house, only to become overwhelmed by the refurbishment task ahead. He also visits a grand Georgian manor built in 1820 and frequented by King Edward VII. The Worthing property was divided into flats in the 1980s and it is in one of these that owners Charlie and Julie are wrestling with how to turn a big Regency reception room into contemporary living and dining space

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners in Nottinghamshire take part in the dinner party competition, hoping to secure the £1,000 prize. First to host are Kev and Chelsey, who reckon their menu of luxury cuisine will win over their guests - but they are alarmed when everyone asks for their expensive steaks to be well-done. Next, 1940s obsessives Jayne and Ricky throw a Second World War-themed bash, before Louise and Mark are let down by some culinary mishaps in the final dinner party

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in the South Wales Valleys, where sisters Carly and Holly ask them to dig out some treasure from their fathers unwanted collection of furniture

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Paralympian Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: If Ever I Would Leave You
programme.desc: Having been thrown out by his new wife Loretta, Carlas ex-husband Nick comes grovelling back to the bar, promising to devote himself to her if she will take him back. Comedy, starring Rhea Perlman and Dan Hedaya

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boss makes him an offer he cant refuse - accept a promotion or lose his job. Norm therefore finds himself working as a corporate killer - the person in charge of firing other employees. Bar-room comedy, starring George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane decides to leave Cheers for good and travel to Europe with Frasier and secretly wishes that Sam would stop her from going, but he is too busy organising her farewell party

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when his inexperienced colleague Andy achieves Rays lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated magazine

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Amy split up and Ray is left to take the blame for making disparaging remarks about marriage. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie discovers she and Frank are not as fit as they thought, so she throws out all their junk food and persuades him to join her on a diet. However, this goes down badly with the rest of the family. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Alistair Burke, the cultured conductor of the Seattle Opera, becomes convinced Frasier is gay, a misunderstanding the shrink decides to cultivate after his misinformed suitor begins to shower him with gifts. Guest starring Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Frasier vie for the affections of the boys former babysitter, and the shrink becomes depressed when his father wins her love. Luckily, his ability to solve several mind-twisting problems puts him in a better mood. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz persuades Frasier to go on a date with her friend - but the arrangement turns out to be a disaster. Niles and Daphne suspect their maid is dishonest

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin angrily accuses Frasier of eavesdropping on Ronees private conversations, while prospective parents Niles and Daphne try to secure the services of Seattles finest nursery artist. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Acerbic chef Gordon Ramsay steps in to transform a family run Haitian juice bar and restaurant in Brooklyn, New York. Jacques Sylvestre opened the Juicy Box to provide more healthy options for the neighbourhood, but its fallen into chaos since he handed over control to his children Q and Napalya

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Buckinghamshire to meet Hugh, who runs a repair and upcycling shop and is in need of a bit of help

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Matt, Mike and Janice head down by the riverside in Durham for one of the biggest events in this historic citys social calendar - the 191st Durham Regatta. Elsewhere, the family explore some of the wonders of the regattas historic surroundings, discover the secrets of Durham Castle, and get a lift in a rare vintage car to see the exotic wonders housed in the wonderful Durham University Botanic Garden

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Paralympian Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Motorbike lovers Carol and Mark from Herefordshire first met nearly 30 years ago and have always dreamed of owning a holiday home in Spain where they can enjoy the sunshine and escape the long winter months. Theyve chosen to look in El Campello on the Costa Blanca, so Laura Hamilton tracks down five options for the pair to consider within their budget of £130,000

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Craft brewery owners Simon and Rebecca sink their savings into a new taproom and Richard and Anthony try to keep up with demand with their motorhome rental company as the Rugby World Cup brings them more business. Natasha and Giles desperately try to keep their Spanish dream alive as their jungle-themed restaurant on the Costa del Sol struggles to turn a profit

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the Occitanie region, Janet and Philip set out to give their tired dining room a regal makeover, battling rotten skirting and a bespoke ceiling, but can they really create a space fit for royalty? In Brittany, Donna and Paul push on with their five-floor derelict home, working on precision tiling and custom skirting for their utility room. But have they taken on more than they can handle? And at Château de Lalande, Stephanie hunts for the perfect spot to build a chicken palace, hopefully without ruffling too many feathers

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, Rodriguez sisters Sophie and Charlotte are on a mission to help Keith and his daughter Caitlin find a holiday home big enough for their whole family. With a firm budget, they tour a trio of tempting ground-floor apartments, and positive first impressions set the bar high. But are Keith and Caitlin willing to compromise on bedroom space, for their ideal location? Sophie takes a break from selling houses to get a makeover, with Charlotte and mum Linda on hand to offer their honest opinions. In Almería, mother and son Sharon and Shaun Garner take on the challenge of matching travel consultant Janet and her husband Dave with a property that they can make their own. From sleek modern villas to rural cortijos packed with renovation potential, the couples open minds - and Daves construction know-how - are put to the test. And away from the search, family takes centre stage as Sharon plans a touching memorial to her late mum, bringing three generations together on the beach she loved

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: The documentary reports from the US state of Minnesota, where a recent surge in immigration raids has left children traumatised across the city of Minneapolis. Paul McNamara investigates the lasting impact on children and also on whole families still living in fear

programme.title: Greggs vs McDonalds: The Fast Feud
programme.desc: Dani Dyer explores the rivalry between the British and US fast food chains. The bakery has risen from its North East roots to become Britains biggest fast-food retailer, expanding so quickly that it will soon have twice as many outlets as McDonalds. The programme examines how Greggs subversive marketing has blinded people to its huge growth, and questions how McDonalds will fight back

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Former nanny Amber wants to have beautiful babies on a farm - but it remains to be seen whether her dashing date has the film star looks she is after. Magician Clint is keen to conjure up a meaningful connection with kooky artist Sanna from Finland, while 79-year-old man about town Jan hopes to be free-spirited 74-year-old widow Chrissys perfect leading man

programme.title: Babylon (2022)
programme.desc: Film assistant Manuel Torres yearns to rise through the ranks in 1920s Hollywood, starting with a lowly position working for matinee idol Jack Conrad. Manny is smitten with ingenue Nellie LaRoy, who intends to achieve big screen fame. Their fates entwine with a motley crew of wannabes and hangers on. Writer/director Damien Chazelles comedy drama, starring Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie and Diego Calva

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The contestants are treated to a banger of a song sung by Little Alex Horne, but some of them dont entirely appreciate it. Kumail Nanjiani holds Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they ask him questions about shapes and colour, Joanna Page reveals her favourite childhood tipple and Armando Iannucci goes for an ice cream

programme.title: Pearl (2022)
programme.desc: In 1918 Texas, teenager Pearl dreams of becoming a dancer in Hollywood in direct opposition to her domineering German immigrant mother. The projectionist of the local cinema fans the flames of the teenagers rebellion and mother and daughter clash violently. Horror, starring Mia Goth and David Corenswet

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Comedian Mawaan Rizwan joins Joe Lycett to explore Dublin. Ten statues across the city have been given QR codes. When visitors scan the code, the statue phones them, so Joe and Mawaan get to hear from Oscar Wilde and Molly Malone. After exploring the citys smallest restaurant, they head to its largest tourist attraction, the Guinness Storehouse, where they learn how to pour the perfect pint and even get their faces printed on it. Day two begins with a swim at Forty Foot, then at Windmill Lane studios the duo learn the story of Irelands answer to Abbey Road and lay down a track of their own

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Wisteria House, Hampshire, where owner Jane Faulkner invites guests to her establishment. Later, the group members try their hands at milking a cow, while 25-year-old Zak causes surprises when he reveals his years of hospitality experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit The Living Room BandB in Bournemouth on their second night, which is co-owned by 25-year-old Zak Busby-Pelekanou. While at the establishment, Mike and Charlie have a hairy issue, and Jane and Amy encounter a spider, before getting to grips with an ambitious breakfast menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to the Valley Hotel in Anglesey, where owner Mike Lewis hopes his five-star pedigree will help him reap dividends in the competition. After a visit to a local RNLI station, guests Jane and Amy are left feeling sluggish when they spot an unwanted visitor in their room, and their criticism leaves the hosts looking for answers

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: David and Elvira Barratt welcome the contestants to Barratts at Tyn Rhyl, Denbighshire, but the group has an unpleasant experience on arrival. The guests take part in an activity at a local cookery school where they are taught the art of preparing and cooking sheeps testicles. However, come feedback time, the hosts are left feeling distraught

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners meet to find out who earned the most and have it out with their rivals. Jane and Amy kick off proceedings with a gripe over David and Elviras coffee criticism, yet are confronted themselves by Zak, who has a score to settle. Mike and Charlie of the Valley Hotel want to get to the bottom of an unwanted intruder during their stay at Wisteria House, and the ladies are challenged again regarding their cleanliness comments. Emotions run high as the cash is counted and the winner is revealed

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Dr Dawn Harper and Dr Ranj Singh go head to head in the messy shaving foam paper marbling challenge, and Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wins four basketball season tickets and needs someone to share them with, but finding compatible companions proves more difficult than she could have imagined. Comedy, starring Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug persuades Carrie to help Deacon with the cooking and childcare over Thanksgiving. Kevin James stars

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon fight over a childhood toy, while Arthur discovers Carrie is buying him an expensive Christmas gift and decides to splash out on something equally costly in return. Comedy, starring Kevin James, Victor Williams and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Arthur becomes convinced he is addicted to nasal spray, while Carrie persuades Doug to see a therapist to help him with his eating habits, with a little too much success

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray keeps visiting Roberts new apartment, which always seems to be swarming with pretty girls - until Debra puts in an appearance and curtails his enthusiasm. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The spirit of Christmas is in short supply when Ray gives his parents a personalised toaster and they sneak off to exchange it for a coffee machine. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover his father let him win a game of table tennis when he was 12, and indignantly demands a rematch, determined to secure a legitimate victory this time. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles is shocked when his former wife Maris asks for his help, deciding it is best to keep it a secret from the heavily pregnant and overemotional Daphne. Frasier goes back to private practice, but finds that treating patients face to face is a real test. Guest starring Dan Castellaneta (The Simpsons) and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles is suspected of being an accomplice to murder when his former wife Maris uses his crossbow to kill her husband - and Frasier does not help matters by accidentally suggesting his brother should receive the death penalty

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier are set up on a blind date by a mutual friend, while Martins gun goes off in the apartment - leaving Niles and Daphne to conceal the damage. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Fountain Cottage in Bellingham, Northumberland. The hosts are hoping their award-winning cafe will give them the edge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Georgia and Paul invite the BandBers into The Shuckburgh Arms in Stoke Doyle. The guests are amazed by the converted barns but things hit a snag when not everyone sleeps soundly. Michael complains of a broken fridge disturbing his slumber but by feedback time, Georgia and Paul are confident theyve done enough to be victorious on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Great Yarmouth to visit Stu and Lous Beachside Holidays. A boat trip brings the group together but a dirty discovery brings down the mood, leaving the hosts concerned about their chances of success on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Alice in Wonderland-themed Hatters Hotel in Skegness, Lincolnshire. Husband-and-wife team Dee and Gary reckon their unique BandB experience will have their guests grinning like Cheshire cats - and the literary decor certainly proves a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the competition. Michael and Danielle from Fountain Cottage arent happy with one set of BandBers who declined a return visit, while The Shuckburgh Arms Georgia and Paul get the snooze blues about one guests complaint

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two house-hunters with different needs - Indu and Jason, who in 2018 wanted to find a family home with potential in Guildford, and fashion designer Shane, who was keen to leave the bustle of the city and make a new life on the north Kent coast way back in 2003. Now Phil Spencer returns to find out if the homes that he and Kirstie Allsopp found have reaped rewards

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Lucy Shepherd gets a taste of a traditional party and local delicacies, and visits a baobab tree that has been a birthplace for generations. As they navigate dense forest, the ever-present threat of elephants looms nearby. With rations running dangerously low, Lucy must put everything she has learned from the hunter-gatherer lifestyle to the test

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Visits to a fortress-style hotel in the Empty Quarter in the United Arab Emirates, a minimalist hotel on the tranquil banks of a Norwegian river, a futuristic fantasy with three bespoke treehouses in Dorset woodland, an eco-friendly yellow submarine on the river banks of County Monaghan in Ireland, and a luxury hotel fashioned from repurposed shipping containers in the New South Wales Australian outback

programme.title: Living (2022)
programme.desc: Overwhelmed at work and lonely at home, a council bureaucrat in the 1950s life receives a medical diagnosis telling him his time is short. Influenced by the lifestyles of a decadent writer and an activist working to transform a bomb site into a playground, he makes a supreme effort to transform his dull life. Drama, starring Bill Nighy, Aimee Lou Wood and Tom Burke

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Former nanny Amber wants to have beautiful babies on a farm - but it remains to be seen whether her dashing date has the film star looks she is after. Magician Clint is keen to conjure up a meaningful connection with kooky artist Sanna from Finland, while 79-year-old man about town Jan hopes to be free-spirited 74-year-old widow Chrissys perfect leading man

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Guy Martins Best Bits
programme.sub-title: Guy Martins World Speed Records (edited version)
programme.desc: The presenter looks back at times when he helped to build and pilot amazing machines to world speed records, and tells the fascinating stories behind the record attempts

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three sets of dinner-party hosts from Plymouth compete, beginning with newlyweds Nicole and Nathan, who offer a fine-dining experience. On the second night, Tracey and Daryls confidence is dented when their guests point out a few culinary mistakes, while the final soiree sees Richard and Sonya present an Irish-themed menu - but Tracey is on critical form

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The contestants are treated to a banger of a song sung by Little Alex Horne, but some of them dont entirely appreciate it. Kumail Nanjiani holds Amy Gledhill and Joel Dommett while they ask him questions about shapes and colour, Joanna Page reveals her favourite childhood tipple and Armando Iannucci goes for an ice cream

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Nicolle and Ben arrive at the retreat keen to spice up their seven-year relationship by having sex with other people. However, when Nicolle reveals that shes a people pleaser who finds it hard to say no, Dr Lori warns the couple that Nicolle needs to vocalise her feelings. The pair invite resident couple Kiki and Sophia to spend some intimate time with them in the hot tub, and the fun continues in the bedroom. But is Nicolle as happy with the nights sexual climax as she seems? Meanwhile, thrill-seekers Katey and Dan pursue a live sex show experience

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to reverse the fortunes of the Mixing Bowl diner in Bellmore, New York, where a talented cooks work is being undone by the managers marketing plans - putting the finances in dire straits

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George travels to Margate, where Joanna and Simon have bought themselves a large Victorian semi-detached house, only to become overwhelmed by the refurbishment task ahead. He also visits a grand Georgian manor built in 1820 and frequented by King Edward VII. The Worthing property was divided into flats in the 1980s and it is in one of these that owners Charlie and Julie are wrestling with how to turn a big Regency reception room into contemporary living and dining space

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners in Nottinghamshire take part in the dinner party competition, hoping to secure the £1,000 prize. First to host are Kev and Chelsey, who reckon their menu of luxury cuisine will win over their guests - but they are alarmed when everyone asks for their expensive steaks to be well-done. Next, 1940s obsessives Jayne and Ricky throw a Second World War-themed bash, before Louise and Mark are let down by some culinary mishaps in the final dinner party

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon OBrien are in the South Wales Valleys, where sisters Carly and Holly ask them to dig out some treasure from their fathers unwanted collection of furniture

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray hosts the words-and-numbers quiz, with Rachel Riley taking care of the board and Susie Dent joined by Paralympian Richard Whitehead in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.sub-title: If Ever I Would Leave You
programme.desc: Having been thrown out by his new wife Loretta, Carlas ex-husband Nick comes grovelling back to the bar, promising to devote himself to her if she will take him back. Comedy, starring Rhea Perlman and Dan Hedaya

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Norms boss makes him an offer he cant refuse - accept a promotion or lose his job. Norm therefore finds himself working as a corporate killer - the person in charge of firing other employees. Bar-room comedy, starring George Wendt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Diane decides to leave Cheers for good and travel to Europe with Frasier and secretly wishes that Sam would stop her from going, but he is too busy organising her farewell party

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Jealousy rears its ugly head when his inexperienced colleague Andy achieves Rays lifelong ambition of having an article published in Sports Illustrated magazine

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Amy split up and Ray is left to take the blame for making disparaging remarks about marriage. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie discovers she and Frank are not as fit as they thought, so she throws out all their junk food and persuades him to join her on a diet. However, this goes down badly with the rest of the family. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Alistair Burke, the cultured conductor of the Seattle Opera, becomes convinced Frasier is gay, a misunderstanding the shrink decides to cultivate after his misinformed suitor begins to shower him with gifts. Guest starring Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin and Frasier vie for the affections of the boys former babysitter, and the shrink becomes depressed when his father wins her love. Luckily, his ability to solve several mind-twisting problems puts him in a better mood. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Roz persuades Frasier to go on a date with her friend - but the arrangement turns out to be a disaster. Niles and Daphne suspect their maid is dishonest

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Martin angrily accuses Frasier of eavesdropping on Ronees private conversations, while prospective parents Niles and Daphne try to secure the services of Seattles finest nursery artist. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Acerbic chef Gordon Ramsay steps in to transform a family run Haitian juice bar and restaurant in Brooklyn, New York. Jacques Sylvestre opened the Juicy Box to provide more healthy options for the neighbourhood, but its fallen into chaos since he handed over control to his children Q and Napalya

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon OBrien and Henry Cole head to Buckinghamshire to meet Hugh, who runs a repair and upcycling shop and is in need of a bit of help

programme.title: Matt Baker: Travels with Mum and Dad
programme.desc: Matt, Mike and Janice head down by the riverside in Durham for one of the biggest events in this historic citys social calendar - the 191st Durham Regatta. programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover his father let him win a game of table tennis when he was 12, and indignantly demands a rematch, determined to secure a legitimate victory this time. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. Niles is shocked when his former wife Maris asks for his help, deciding it is best to keep it a secret from the heavily pregnant and overemotional Daphne. Frasier goes back to private practice, but finds that treating patients face to face is a real test. Guest starring Dan Castellaneta (The Simpsons) and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part two of two. Niles is suspected of being an accomplice to murder when his former wife Maris uses his crossbow to kill her husband - and Frasier does not help matters by accidentally suggesting his brother should receive the death penalty

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier are set up on a blind date by a mutual friend, while Martins gun goes off in the apartment - leaving Niles and Daphne to conceal the damage. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer sells his soul to the Devil in return for a doughnut, a gremlin attacks Ottos bus while Bart is on his way to school, and the family sets out to end a vampiric Mr Burns reign of terror

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family goes on holiday to Niagara Falls, where a mix-up sees Lisa mistakenly granted asylum in Canada and Marge has to come to her daughters rescue

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns cuts health care benefits for his employees, so Marge buys healing crystals to treat Barts ADD and decides to sell them to support her family when they appear to work

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is Fountain Cottage in Bellingham, Northumberland. The hosts are hoping their award-winning cafe will give them the edge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Georgia and Paul invite the BandBers into The Shuckburgh Arms in Stoke Doyle. The guests are amazed by the converted barns but things hit a snag when not everyone sleeps soundly. Michael complains of a broken fridge disturbing his slumber but by feedback time, Georgia and Paul are confident theyve done enough to be victorious on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers are in Great Yarmouth to visit Stu and Lous Beachside Holidays. A boat trip brings the group together but a dirty discovery brings down the mood, leaving the hosts concerned about their chances of success on payment day

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to the Alice in Wonderland-themed Hatters Hotel in Skegness, Lincolnshire. Husband-and-wife team Dee and Gary reckon their unique BandB experience will have their guests grinning like Cheshire cats - and the literary decor certainly proves a hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers, before discovering who has won the competition. Michael and Danielle from Fountain Cottage arent happy with one set of BandBers who declined a return visit, while The Shuckburgh Arms Georgia and Paul get the snooze blues about one guests complaint

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Claire from Bedfordshire has been vacationing on Majorca since she was a child and feels a special connection with the island. She wants to buy her very own holiday home in the heart of its capital, Palma, and brings along lifelong friend Debbie to help her with the search. Claire has a budget of £190,000, so Craig Rowe tries to find five attractive properties available within that sum to show her

programme.title: Your Song
programme.desc: Alison Hammond takes the pop-up stage to Edinburgh. A woman sings an Etta James number for the bus driver who left her a handwritten note and drove away, a 22-year-old performs his mums favourite song, a former soldier sings the Zach Bryan track that helped him through PTSD, and a hospital volunteer sings A Fond Kiss by Robert Burns for a D-Day veteran on his 100th birthday

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Catching up with two house-hunters with different needs - Indu and Jason, who in 2018 wanted to find a family home with potential in Guildford, and fashion designer Shane, who was keen to leave the bustle of the city and make a new life on the north Kent coast way back in 2003. Now Phil Spencer returns to find out if the homes that he and Kirstie Allsopp found have reaped rewards

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer visit Nilesh and Raakhee in Maidenhead to help them decide whether to love and renovate their home or list it for sale. The couple moved into their four-bedroom house two years ago but since their child was born a year ago, the small shut-off kitchen has become a big issue and Nilesh would like to be closer to family in Leicestershire but Raakhee believes that with a bit of love, care and fixing-up it could be their forever home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Secret Africa: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Lucy Shepherd gets a taste of a traditional party and local delicacies, and visits a baobab tree that has been a birthplace for generations. As they navigate dense forest, the ever-present threat of elephants looms nearby. With rations running dangerously low, Lucy must put everything she has learned from the hunter-gatherer lifestyle to the test

programme.title: Worlds Most Secret Hotels
programme.desc: Visits to a fortress-style hotel in the Empty Quarter in the United Arab Emirates, a minimalist hotel on the tranquil banks of a Norwegian river, a futuristic fantasy with three bespoke treehouses in Dorset woodland, an eco-friendly yellow submarine on the river banks of County Monaghan in Ireland, and a luxury hotel fashioned from repurposed shipping containers in the New South Wales Australian outback

programme.title: Living (2022)
programme.desc: Overwhelmed at work and lonely at home, a council bureaucrat in the 1950s life receives a medical diagnosis telling him his time is short. Influenced by the lifestyles of a decadent writer and an activist working to transform a bomb site into a playground, he makes a supreme effort to transform his dull life. Drama, starring Bill Nighy, Aimee Lou Wood and Tom Burke

programme.title: Babylon (2022)
programme.desc: Film assistant Manuel Torres yearns to rise through the ranks in 1920s Hollywood, starting with a lowly position working for matinee idol Jack Conrad. Manny is smitten with ingenue Nellie LaRoy, who intends to achieve big screen fame. Their fates entwine with a motley crew of wannabes and hangers on. Writer/director Damien Chazelles comedy drama, starring Brad Pitt, Margot Robbie and Diego Calva

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: Gordons late-night investigation of Mrs Whites Golden Rule Cafe turns up shocking results, and a bombshell reveals a secret financial crisis. Will the 101-year-old proprietor and her 75-year-old son Larry ever hand over the reins and retire?

programme.title: Gordon Ramsays Secret Service
programme.desc: The chefs thorough late-night investigation of MacGregors unearths far scarier secrets than the ghosts that are rumoured to haunt the restaurants dining room - mouldy leftovers, frozen produce and the previous owners discarded belongings. Burdened by the past, and up to her neck in debt, new owner Stephanie allows head chef Mike, whos also her boyfriend, to cut corners in the kitchen. Can Gordon orchestrate a fresh start?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef comes to the aid of a French restaurant in the heart of Moorpark, California. The pompous, over-complicated cuisine is keeping the customers away and there is an imminent threat of bankruptcy. However, the owner is vigorously opposed to change, despite the failings of his current business model

programme.title: Guy Martins Best Bits

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son embark a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, aiming to experience extremes from the fiery heat of the Mediterranean to the icy tundras of the Arctic Circle. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

The pair finish in the capital Budapest, where Barney has arranged to meet a world-famous escapologist

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show

programme.desc: The actor and his son hit the road together again, but this time they are staying closer to home and heading for Europe as they travel from Essex to Italys Amalfi coast. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney continue their European adventure in Germany. They head to the city of Frankfurt, where Brad is pushed to the edge, literally, as he attempts to abseil down the side of a building, facing forwards. The boys also make a stop at a bratwurst-themed hotel and soak up some local Bavarian culture when they have a go at finger wrestling. The pair finish off their time in Germany with a wet and wild adventure in the mountains

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad
programme.desc: The actor and his son continue their European adventure in Switzerland, where they take a ride on a mountain rollercoaster before exercising their vocal chords when they try the Swiss tradition of yodelling. programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.title: Bradley and Barney Walsh: Breaking Dad

programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampas metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homers unattended gym bag leads to a terrorism scare, prompting the people of Springfield to vote for the hiring of a British security consultant - which results in the mass installation of surveillance cameras. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: First Dates

But if the pair dont act quickly, they might not be able to afford anything. programme.desc: In Oxfordshire, amateur MC James and his partner Heather have every confidence in their French-influenced food, which they follow with a basement rave. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former soldier Jason takes command of his military wedding to his bride-to-be Sacha. Having served in the army for seven years, he wants to celebrate the heroes of World War Two by getting Sacha to arrive at the wedding ceremony in an old war plane, then a tank. However, she is hoping his army days are behind him and is desperate for her big day to be a traditional, intimate event. With a mother-in-law to impress, and a bride hoping he will put her first, will Jason have to run for cover when his plans are revealed?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Darren plans a movie premiere-inspired wedding for his bride-to-be Jacquie, but she is hoping for a small, elegant and traditional event. The Warrington couple have four children and eight grandchildren and could never afford to get married. But they now have a budget of £14,000 to spend and Darren has just three weeks to organise the big day and seek the approval of his future stepchildren

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Ray Blanchette, CEO of restaurant chain TGI Fridays, has recently made changes to re-energise the brand. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Twenty seven-year-old single mother and dog groomer Brenna seeks a man who wont be put off by the fact she has a daughter. She hopes to find a connection with dog-loving electrician Ross. Twenty-four-year-old party girl Tori is looking for someone to bring a bit of sparkle into her life. Shes matched with 30-year-old beautician Sophie, whos on the lookout for a life partner. Plus, actress Alice meets 26-year-old cocktail bartender Jac, who is hoping to shake his life up a bit

programme.title: Rocketman (2019)
programme.desc: Elton John enters an addiction rehabilitation session, and recounts his life in a flashback, covering his days as young Reginald Dwight growing up in 1950s Britain. He takes piano lessons, makes his way into the Royal Academy of Music, and hones his craft in local pubs before becoming one of the worlds biggest pop stars. Golden Globe-winning biopic, starring Taron Egerton, Jamie Bell and Richard Madden

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose a date from six naked people whose bare bodies are revealed from the feet up. First up is 27-year-old sex-toy tester Hayley from Plymouth. Hayley has cerebral palsy and has only ever dated friends. Can she find someone to be more than just good friends? She is followed by 25-year-old tree surgeon Dmitri from Nottingham, who is looking for the perfect partner. However, once he picks his date, Dmitri is in for a big shock

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The singletons include 64-year-old self-confessed cougar Lynda, who has now decided she wants to find a more mature man who shares her lust for life. Thirty-eight-year-old meat-loving teacher Marie has to keep her sledgehammer wit in check when she finds out that her date, fellow teacher Davin, is a vegan, and following one of the most excruciating dates in First Dates history, Fred is determined to find 25-year-old DJ Tom love

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching, with cameras capturing their instant reactions. Shows under scrutiny include Vigil, Ready to Mingle, Beat the Chasers, Help, Antiques Roadshow, Life Drawing Live!, Take a Hike, and news coverage of tennis US Open. From September 2021

programme.title: Americas Next Top Model
programme.desc: Highlights of the series before the final elimination, including previously unseen footage of hip-hop star Game showing Allison his secret handshake, Biancas altercations over the phone and Lisa turning the swimming pool into a foam party

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is filmed fleeing from a wild bear and becomes a local laughing stock. Determined to redeem himself and salvage his reputation, he builds a special protective suit and sets about organising a rematch - to be fought on his terms

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Hunt for the Great Albino Pumpkin

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: In the first elimination challenge of the series, the eight teams have ten hours to construct Lego fairy tales with a twist. Fairy tales and genres are combined at random - think science fiction and Beauty and the Beast, or horror and Little Red Riding Hood - to give a brand-new take on a well-known story. The holders of the Big Brick choose their combinations first, and are also immune from elimination. Which fantastical build will become the stuff of Lego Masters legend - and whose story will end here?

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: In Penangs capital, George Town, the teams bite off more than they can chew with bulls penis soup, and follow in Jimmy Choos footsteps, before an uphill race to the finish

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: The group return from Silchester Farm and its not long before everyone finds out about Chuggs and Zeynos secret Scottish rendezvous. Jazz and Inga continue to adhere to the boundaries they set within their friendship, but when Jazz introduces new flame Meri to Jules and Jack, it becomes clear that shes struggling to move on. Newly single Freddy attempts to embark on a casual fling with his ex Beks

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of Jacks Waterfront at St Clair Shores in Michigan are keen to hear the fiery chefs advice for turning their failing seafood restaurant around. The lakeside location is a popular summer spot with fantastic views, but an uninspiring menu and a manager more skilled at socialising than organising are preventing them from achieving year-round success

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of the owners of Hannah and Masons, a French bistro in Cranbury, New Jersey. Members of staff complain their pay cheques bounce, and the kitchen cooler is so unhygienic that Gordon makes the decision to close the restaurant on Valentines Day - the busiest night of the year

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, where the three owners regularly come into conflict as they each try to assert their authority over the business, causing confusion for all. When one of the trio stubbornly resists the changes the Scottish chef is hoping to implement, sparks begin to fly

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The fifth Commitment Ceremony erupts when Juliette exposes some incendiary messages written by Bec, leading to a dramatic departure.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The bad blood over Becs leaked texts is still bubbling, and more confrontation is in store when the couples swap partners, leaving loyalties hanging by a thread

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog (2020)
programme.desc: Sonic, a blue hedgehog who can run at supersonic speeds, is transported to Earth. A decade later, while enjoying life in Montana, his speedy skills create an electromagnetic pulse. Scientific genius Dr Robotnik is hired to investigate, and becomes obsessed with capturing the creature for his power. Live-action fantasy adventure based on the video games, starring James Marsden and Jim Carrey, with the voice of Ben Schwartz

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is appointed Springfields new sanitation commissioner, but finds it so hard to keep his elaborate election promises that he is forced to spend the years budget allocation in his first month in charge. Featuring the guest voices of U2 and Steve Martin

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Two company executives hire Homer to climb Springfields most treacherous mountain, the ominously named Murderhorn, as a promotional stunt for their energy bar product. With the guest voice of Brendan Fraser

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart uses industrial adhesive to stick assorted novelty items to his face, while Lisa persuades Homer to let her visit the museum - but takes the wrong bus and becomes lost in an unfamiliar part of Springfield

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge try to breathe new life into their relationship by canoodling in public places, while Bart and Lisa use Grampas metal detector to hunt for hidden treasure

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart decides to steal a kiss from his crush at school after taking advice from Grampa, but the plan backfires when she reacts in disgust. Lisas popularity soars after she receives a bad grade, but when it turns out to be mistake and the bullying resumes, her spirits are lifted by a visit from Michelle Obama. With the guest voices of Angela Bassett and Sarah Silverman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart head to the seaside in the hope of finding treasure that has washed ashore during a storm. Instead, they encounter a beached whale, which Lisa immediately becomes emotionally attached to. Meanwhile, Homer receives a huge electricity bill and takes drastic action to prevent it from happening again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homers unattended gym bag leads to a terrorism scare, prompting the people of Springfield to vote for the hiring of a British security consultant - which results in the mass installation of surveillance cameras. But Chief Wiggum and the other officers tire of staring at screens, so they recruit town residents including Marge and Ned to keep watch. With the guest voice of Eddie Izzard

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose a date from six naked people - and first up is 23-year-old Nameya from Bristol. Nameya is bisexual and hopes to find her perfect package in either a sexy guy or her first ever girlfriend. Next up is 35-year-old Dan from Bolton. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party, but apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else

programme.title: Gogglebox

First shown in May 2023

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Tony Blair, JK Rowling and Ian McKellen are present to witness the Simpson familys arrival on holiday in London, where Homer crashes a rented car into the Queens horse-drawn carriage and gets locked up in the Tower

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam films his high-schools final football game of the year, but misses the winning touchdown. Beverly discovers her neighbour is moving and is determined to buy his home.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barrys case of poison ivy causes problems for Erica and Geoff, while having Mr Glascott living next door presents a challenge for the family

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Manny takes time out to play with Luke, before having a heart-to-heart with stepsister Claire. Gloria goes shopping for a dress with Alex, and Phil urges Jay to fly his new model aeroplane with him. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchells mother tries to make amends for the incident at Jay and Glorias wedding but no one is happy to see her, and the whole family has dinner at Claires house. American comedy, guest starring Shelley Long

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay continues his travels across America saving failing restaurants from disaster. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil spends quality time with Haley and takes her on a tour of his old college. Meanwhile, Gloria and Jay are forced to talk about an intimate subject with Manny. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The gang is quick to help a neighbour whose house has burnt down, but nothing quite works out the way it was intended. American comedy, starring Ed ONeill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is cast in the title role of Everyman, a superhero movie penned by Comic Book Guy, but struggles with the exercise and diet regimen required to get in shape for the part. With the guest voice of Seth Rogen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart plays a prank on Mrs Krabappel, but it backfires badly and results in her being fired, leaving him feeling so guilty that he resolves to do everything he can to get her reinstated - even if it means discrediting her replacement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge goes on the offensive and plans a protest against a combat sport that has captivated Springfields male population. When promoter Chett Englebrecht hears of her campaign, he challenges her to a fight - and agrees to shut down his entire operation if she beats him

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Sixty-one-year-old finance worker and raver Sandra is paired with part-time DJ Lance in her search for love and competitive Pokemon player Isaac who struggles to meet women who appreciate his passions on a date with book lover Molly who is searching for a nerdy guy. Dog walker Holly goes on a date with science graduate Joe, the pair bond over their love of pub quizzes but Joes attempts at playground flirting might ruin his chances

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the concluding part of his trip to the Mill Street Bistro in Norwalk, Ohio, Gordons disagreement with proprietor Joe Nagy erupts into one of his most intense confrontations yet. Just when it looks like he has turned the corner and is ready to accept help, Joe slips back into his old ways, denying his own failings and picking petty fights. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Maggie cant drop off to sleep, Homer tells her a bedtime story about a holiday to the Grand Canyon taken by the Simpsons and the Flanders. At first the two families are at odds, but when they get stranded, Homer and Ned must go for help and the clans begin to bond

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron seizes the opportunity to celebrate his birthday, which only comes around once every four years, so the pressure is on Mitchell to organise an occasion to remember. Phils day is ruined by the female members of his family, who are all feeling emotional, while Jay tries to assert his manhood when it is called into question. American comedy, starring Eric Stonestreet, Jesse Tyler Ferguson and Ty Burrell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cameron bumps into former clowning partner Lewis at the funeral of his mentor, and the pair decide to resurrect their double-act for a childs birthday party. programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that wont break the budget

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates how to prepare nutritious meals for around £1.55 a portion. He cooks up a roast side of salmon with all the trimmings and uses the leftovers in a filo pie, before showing a takeaway lover how to make a lamb burger for a fraction of the price of his usual Friday night fast-food treat. Plus, a woman receives tips on putting unwanted bread to good use

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares roast chicken with all the trimmings, before turning the leftovers into a stew with dumplings, and rustles up cauliflower and broccoli cheese using frozen vegetables. The chef also demonstrates a recipe for making lamb koftas on a budget and shows a woman how to use up the fruit she normally throws away

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by Nick Nairn for a trip aboard luxury train the Royal Scotsman. During the journey, James visits the trains kitchens to prepare a traditional duck a lorange. Along the way they stop off at a bakery in a former prisoner of war camp and historic Scone Palace, where they prepare ham and cheese toastie in the grounds

programme.title: James Martins Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James takes a trip to the Cairngorms National Park, joined by Nick Nairn. They visit some friendly reindeer and brave the rapids on the River Spey, where they go whitewater rafting

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: Si King and Dave Myers visit Dumfries and Galloway, heading to New Galloway and Potterland Farm in Castle Douglas They also make dishes including butter poached lobster served with Scottish bucatini pasta, a lamb and caper pie, and caramelised apple cheesecake, and also learn about Scotlands national poet Robert Burns and his strange dietary requirements

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: The Hairy Bikers explore Lancashire, the county where Dave was born, the duo begin their trip at Morecambe Bay. They also travel north of Liverpool to the market town of Ormskirk, and the village of Tarleton, to visit Croftpak Nurseries. On their travels they cook dishes including lamb chop pakoras with a tahdig, a Lancashire butter and potato pie, and a gingerbread and black cherry trifle with honeycomb topping

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: They Bikers explore Merseyside and The Wirral, dropping in at a forward-thinking farm, a Chinese institution, Sans Cafe at Liverpools docks, Chriss Chippy and The Seafood Shack in the Wirral. They cook dishes including a traditional egg foo yung, and with the pork from their farm visit they add a porky twist, plus their own take on Chris salt and pepper chips

programme.title: The Hairy Bikers Go West
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King are in north-west Wales, discovering a host of inspiring local producers who typify the areas rich diversify. They meet Maggie, a Nigerian kitchen goddess whose spicy West African dishes are heating up the village of Penygroes, and Steff, whose love of travel inspired him to open his own speciality coffee shop 10 years ago. There are also visits to farmers Matt and Jenny, who grow food by replicating the ecosystems found in the wild, and a bakery that produces Kurdish pasties

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.sub-title: Ill Be Waving as You Drive Away - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Just as Mary falls in love with newcomer Seth Barton, her eyesight begins to worsen. Charles takes her to an optometrist, but the news is not good - Marys vision cannot be saved and she will soon go blind. In denial, Charles does not tell his daughter until she finds to her horror she is completely blind. Mary becomes very bitter over her predicament and having to rely on others for basic needs. Drama, starring Michael Landon

programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary is sent to a blind school in Iowa, where she meets Adam Kendall. programme.desc: The so-called Jenner Beach murders of August 2004, in which a young couple was shot to death as they slept on a California beach. Satanic imagery nearby led local deputies on a manhunt, but the case wasnt resolved for 13 years

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: A suspected serial killer prowling Hollywood. As the number of victims climbed, one brave woman fought back fiercely and managed to survive

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: A case in which the dismembered body of a missing woman turned up in trash bags. A detectives pursuit of the suspect prompted the question - could this man be a serial killer?

programme.title: Still a Mystery
programme.desc: A US soldier meets harm in Upstate New York, and his killers may have been his fellow GIs. A missing mans haunting voicemail is his final clue.

programme.title: Truth About Murder with Sunny Hostin
programme.desc: The former prosecutor journeys to rural Galien, Michigan, to investigate the case of a 33-year-old woman who, after disappearing, was found in a shallow grave

programme.title: Married to Evil
programme.desc: When Olivia meets Christopher, she thinks she found the perfect father figure for her kids. But before long, he shows his disturbing true colours

programme.title: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: The case of a seemingly happy married couple with five children and a growing business, for whom everything changed in an instant when an explosive encounter blew their lives apart

programme.title: Twisted Love
programme.desc: How a man became fixated on his co-worker, believing they should marry. The problem is, she was already married - to a jealous husband

programme.title: Bad Henry: Serial Strangler
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of Bad Henry Louis Wallace, one of the USs most notorious serial killers. When the body of Brandi Henderson is found in her home in 1994, detective Garry McFadden, the only African American on the North Carolina homicide squad in the 1990s and his team at the Charlotte-Mecklenburg police department were intent on tracking down the murderer

programme.title: Deadly Sins
programme.desc: A wicked widow is driven by greed, lust and anger. She charms a third husband into her lair, wreaking havoc on his kids, then slaying him

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: A body-building attorney lands her own reality series. A year later, investigators used the show to map how she went from the spotlight to stabbing victim

programme.title: Death by Fame
programme.desc: A deputy sheriff turns in his badge to pursue a career in acting. When a shooting leaves him injured and his wife dead, police learn theres more to this court TV star

programme.title: Married with Secrets
programme.desc: A case in which a police officer was found dead in Illinois, putting the town on lockdown. Shortly afterwards, sordid details of the deceased cops secret life began to emerge

programme.title: Married with Secrets
programme.desc: The case of Bill Douglas, a respected doctor at a Boston university. His focus was not on science, but on a prostitute and together, their double lives led to murder

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. programme.desc: Post-apocalyptic thriller, set in a future where the world has been ravaged by high speed winds, making gliders the ideal form of transport. Two law officers transport a wanted murderer to prison, only for the fugitive to be kidnapped by a mercenary pilot hoping to claim the reward. The bounty hunter and his hostage flee into the slipstream, a vast canyon carved out by the winds that is home to a mysterious religious cult, with the cops in hot pursuit. But he soon discovers his prisoner isnt what he appears to be. Sci-fi thriller, starring Bill Paxton, Bob Peck and Mark Hamill

programme.title: Impostor (2002)

Sci-fi drama, based on Philip K Dicks short story, starring Gary Sinise, Madeleine Stowe and Vincent DOnofrio

Comedy adventure, starring Brad Pitt, Angelina Jolie, Vince Vaughn and Adam Brody

programme.desc: A hunter and collector of rare and exotic animals bags a priceless white jaguar for a zoo, but the ship bearing his precious cargo has two predators caged in its hold - the cat, and a political assassin being extradited to the Unites States. After the assassin breaks free - and then frees the jaguar - the hunter feverishly stalks the ships cramped corridors in hot pursuit of his prey, right up until the unpredictable climax. Action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, Famke Janssen and Kevin Durand

programme.desc: Every six years an alien species forces an ancient order of jiu-jitsu warriors to come together in order to fight the invaders. Action sci-fi, starring Nicolas Cage, Alain Moussi, Eddie Steeples and Marie Avgeropoulos

Adventure, starring William Holden, Grace Kelly, Fredric March and Mickey Rooney

Action adventure, starring Robert Mitchum, Robert Wagner, Richard Egan, May Britt and Lee Philips

programme.desc: When US B-24 bomber pilot Clair Cline is captured in northern Germany, he and his fellow PoWs must find a way to survive their captivity during the Second World War. Drama, starring Jack Ashton and Elliot James Langridge

programme.desc: A bomb causes problems for a defecting major. Tale with a spine-chilling twist, starring Martin Landau

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A newlywed couple awake one morning to find everything around them artificial and unfamiliar

programme.title: Wanted (2008)
programme.desc: A disillusioned man learns his father was a member of a secret society of superpowered assassins dedicated to eliminating people who are destined to commit acts of evil in the future. Having inherited his fathers special abilities, he is recruited into the organisation and must take on a former member who has betrayed it. Action adventure, starring James McAvoy, Angelina Jolie and Morgan Freeman
